title: Eislomi III
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the astronomical object Eislomi III, also known as Eislo|the would-be Sith apprentice [[Collan Eislo]]|linebreak=1}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Eislomi III |region=*[[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]]The [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the entirety of grid square O-8 in the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]]. |sector=[[Eislomi sector/Legends|Eislomi sector]] |system=[[Eislo system/Legends|Eislo system]] |coordinates=O-8 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest=[[Eislomi III HoloNet relay station|HoloNet relay station]] |flora= |fauna=[[Ratter thist]] |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports=[[Cordioline trehansicol]] |affiliation=[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] }} {{Quote|Where were the transmissions headed?''"
"''Toward Eislomi sector. Specifically, in the direction of the Eislomi III HoloNet relay station.''"
"''In other words, a dead end.''"
"''Looks like it.|[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and [[Moranda Savich]]|''[[Vision of the Future]]''}} '''Eislomi III''', also known as '''Eislo''', was an astronomical object located in the [[Eislomi sector/Legends|Eislomi sector]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]. It was the site of a [[Eislomi III HoloNet relay station|HoloNet relay station]]. On Eislomi III, [[ratter thist]]s were used to guard livestock in mountain valleys. Many products were exported from the astronomical object, including [[cordioline trehansicol]], one of the only insecticides that could exterminate [[metalmite]]s. ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|Sorry, folks. Did you want us to order some of those krisses for you, ma'am? Klif, you find anything on the lists?''"
"''Looks like we can get them from a supplier on Eislo—have them here in two or three days. Or we can get them shipped in straight from Kordu itself. That'll probably be a little cheaper, but it'll take longer.|[[Drend Navett]] and [[Klif]]|}} [[Jason Fry]], co-author of ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', confirmed in [[June]] [[2015]] that Eislomi III and Eislo were the same astronomical object.{{EmailCite|email=File:EAOC discussion.jpg|creator=Jason Fry|date=2015-06-30}} ==Appearances== *''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Astronomical objects in the Inner Rim]] [[Category:Astronomical objects in the Trans-Hydian Borderlands]] [[Category:Eislomi sector locations]] [[Category:New Republic astronomical objects]]
